subject: A small mole-like creature with large clawed forelimbs in a dirt or outdoor earthy environment
description: A small, compact creature with a mole-like body stands in what appears to be an earthy outdoor environment. Its most prominent feature is a set of large, distinctly shaped clawed forelimbs. The body is grey or off-white in coloring. Bright sparkle or scratch marks near the claws suggest movement or gleaming metal. The background shows a natural outdoor setting with soil, plants, and warm lighting.
foreground: Small mole-like creature with large clawed forelimbs
background: Earthy outdoor setting with soil and plants
emotion: eager and energetic; compact alert posture
